settings.hero_headline: Timeless shapes. Set in gold, worn every day.
settings.hero_body: The Classic collection is built for the everyday: Clean lines, considered proportions, materials that only get better with time. Each piece hand-finished in 18K gold at Vibe's workshop in Mumbai.

settings.label: THE HOOPS
settings.subtext:
Classic Solitaire Hoops: a single brilliant-cut diamond, set in 18K gold. The kind of earring you put on in the morning and forget you're wearing.

Soft proportions, clean shapes, and 18K gold that ages well. Made to be worn together, day after day.
